title: Bazi Life Dossier Infographic AI
sourceTitle: Bazi Life Dossier Infographic AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Vertical Bazi life dossier infographic with portrait, timeline, charts, badges, and modular report notes. English modules: Four Pillars, Five Elements, Luck Cycle, Wealth Path, Career Pattern, Relationship Pattern, Life Timeline. Premium cream report layout. English-only visible text. No Chinese characters anywhere. Clean readable English labels. No watermarks, no fake platform logos, no unreadable pseudo text. variant focus: Bazi Life Dossier Infographic V1. visible text language: English only.
